docket_entries.description: STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM COMMISSIONER FILED BY MONTEITH, AMANDA KNEPPER, KATIE
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO DEFENDANT ON 05/04/18. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER - NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED - UNABLE TO FORWARD."
DEPOSIT OF JUDGMENT DEBTOR BY DEFENDANT KNEPPER, KATIE

REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE TO JUDGMENT CREDITOR AND INSTRUCTIONS MAILED TO PLAINTIFF ON MAY 25, 2018. NOTICE IS RE-MAILED TO PLAINTIFF THIS DATE AS JUDGMENT CREDITOR'S REQUEST FOR FUNDS NOT COMPLETED.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,324.56 FILED BY MONTEITH, AMANDA AS TO DEFENDANT KNEPPER, KATIE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-04-2018 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-04-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-04-2018 BY PRO TEM JEAN MILEFF. PLAINTIFF AMANDA MONTEITH IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT KATIE KNEPPER IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-04-2018 - JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $40.00) SERVED APR-17-2018, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT KNEPPER, KATIE
NOTICE TO JUDGMENT CREDITOR OF DEPOSIT OF FILED BY DEFENDANT KNEPPER, KATIE
JUDGMENT CREDITOR'S REQUEST FOR FUNDS (SIGNED) FORWARDED TO ACCOUNTING DEPT BASKET FILED BY PLAINTIFF MONTEITH, AMANDA
REFUND/REIMBURSEMENT OF $2,363.25 RE 35369 FOR TRANSACTION R2818525D009 (DEPOSIT OF JUDGMENT), PAYABLE TO AMANDA MONTEITH, DOC #1909286567, WARRANT #38205435, DATED AUG-30-2018

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MONTEITH, AMANDA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KNEPPER, KATIE $2,259.73 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,349.73 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, (DEBTOR PAID IN FULL & IN CASH) AS TO DEFENDANT KNEPPER, KATIE
